name: Shrimp Louisiane Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions, bell pepper, and garlic in butter until crisp-tender.
2. Add shrimp; cook 3 minutes longer.
3. Stir in soup, rice, parsley, lemon juice, and seasonings. Mix well.
4. Spoon mixture into a buttered shallow 2-quart casserole.
5. Sprinkle with paprika. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
